query: What do you have by the Universal House of Justice?
response: The library holds 475 documents by the Universal House of Justice, covering a range of topics. Some notable works include "Regarding Economic Life" and "Marking the Bicentenary of the Birth of Bahá’u’lláh". These documents often explore themes such as the ["Revelation, both in terms of individual growth"](https://siftersearch.com/library/Baha'i/Administrative/the-five-year-plan-2006-2011-messages-of-the-universal-house-of-justice#p1670), *The Five Year Plan: 2006-2011: Messages of the Universal House of Justice*.

response: The library holds an impressive 41,590 Bahá'í documents across various collections, including Baha'i Books, Reference, Papers, and News. Among these, you can explore works like ["A Partial Inventory of the Works of the Central Figures of the Bahá'í Faith"](https://oceanlibrary.com/selections-from-the-writings-of-the-bab) by Steven Phelps, which offers a comprehensive look at Bahá'í writings. query: What Hindu scriptures do you carry?
response: The library holds 127 Hindu texts, covering collections such as Bhakti and Devotional Works and Epics. Among these, you can explore [Gitanjali (Song Offerings) by Rabindranath Tagore](https://oceanlibrary.com/hymns-of-atharva-veda) and [Hindu Literature - Ramayana, Nala, Sakuntala](https://oceanlibrary.com/hymns-of-atharva-veda). In the *Bhagavad Gita*, there's a moment where Krishna offers Arjuna ["sense divine"](https://oceanlibrary.com/hymns-of-atharva-veda) to perceive his glory, highlighting the profound spiritual insights these texts provide. Additionally, the *Upanishads* encourage us to ["make our hearts free from prejudice"](https://oceanlibrary.com/hymns-of-atharva-veda), drawing inspiration, love, and wisdom from these sacred writings.

scores.diagnosis: The response provides a good overview of the Hindu texts available but lacks accurate citations and proper integration of quotes. The assistant should ensure that quotes are correctly attributed to their sources and that they directly support the claims made. Improving citation accuracy and integrating quotes more effectively would enhance the overall quality of the response.

query: How many documents by 'Abdu'l-Bahá do you have, and which ones discuss governance?
response: The library holds 623 documents by 'Abdu'l-Bahá, which are part of the Baha'i Books collection. Among these, the Core Tablets and Administrative collections contain writings that discuss governance.
